scripts.tauri:dev: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri build
scripts.build:win:x64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis
scripts.build:win:arm64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri build --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis
scripts.build:win: npm run build:win:x64 && npm run build:win:arm64
scripts.build:mac:universal: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles dmg,app
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:linux:x64 && npm run build:linux:arm64
scripts.flatpak:bundle: flatpak-builder --repo=flatpak-repo --force-clean flatpak-build run.rosie.chrysanthemum.yml && flatpak build-bundle flatpak-repo dist/Chrysanthemum-Linux.flatpak run.rosie.chrysanthemum
scripts.release:win: npm run build:win && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/gpg-sign.js
scripts.release:mac: npm run build:mac:universal && npm run build:mac:zip && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/gpg-sign.js
scripts.release:linux: npm run build:linux && npm run flatpak:clean && npm run flatpak:bundle && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/gpg-sign.js
